calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions On The The Determination Of Entitlement To Trust Distribution.
Off Calendar Nov-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for Co-Petitioner.

Mr. Bresler stated that they have now discovered that two $10,000.00 gifts have lapsed because predeceased Beneficiaries did not have issue. Mr. Bresler also explained that Bill, Doris and Cathy had no issue, that they have all filed affidavits to collect pursuant to 13100 and that Toni's interest goes to her Estate Administrator. Mr. Bresler also stated that Mr. Wong did not restate the charities and that he added two other people. The Petition for Instructions on the Determination of Entitlement to Trust Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions On The The Determination Of Entitlement To Trust Distribution.
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Continued To Oct-01-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On The The Determination Of Entitlement To Trust Distribution.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Continued To Sep-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bressler for Dennis Fong.

Mr. Bressler stated that responses to the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes were electronically submitted late last night. The Petition for Instructions on the Determination of Entitlement to Trust Distribution was continued to September 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions On The The Determination Of Entitlement To Trust Distribution.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On The The Determination Of Entitlement To Trust Distribution.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for and with Peter Tom (Petitioner).

The Court noted that counsel is requesting the March 7, 2006 handwritten letter be deemed as an amendment to the Trust and held discussion with regards to the trust language and the delivery of the amendment. Peter reported that the letter was hand delivered to him by his cousin and that he cousin did not mention anything father to him when he handed him the letter. The Petition for Instructions on the Determination of Entitlement to Trust Distribution was taken under submission. The Court request Mr. Bresler submit an updated form of order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
